positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a majestic, stylized wolf howling at a crescent moon, integrated with subtle geometric celestial patterns. The composition should feature a strong, central silhouette of the wolf and moon, using thick, continuous black lines on a pure white background. The color palette should be monochrome black ink only. Incorporate dynamic, yet clean, composition suitable for printing on t-shirts or posters. Style: Modern linocut, graphic design, single-weight ink drawing. High contrast, centered, clean vector style.
negative: blur, low resolution, text, watermark, artifact, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, sloppy, photographic, 3d, gradients, color bleed
